calendar.matters:
Petition By Co Trustee For Instructions Re Distribution Of Trust Estate And For Accounting
Off Calendar Jan-21-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Marvin Wong and Helen Wong. Carolyn Farren for and with Edmund Wong.

Counsel informed the Court that they reached an agreement. Ms. Farren read the terms of the stipulation/agreement for the record. Ms. Farren will prepare a stipulation and order and circulate it to Ms. Ng.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
